name: Typography
description: Provides expert typography selection and usage guidance — matching typefaces to brand personality, optimizing readability, creating type hierarchies, and ensuring typographic decisions support rather than undermine creative work.

variables.name: brand
variables.description: Brand or project requiring typography guidance

variables.name: current_fonts
variables.description: Typefaces currently in use or under consideration

variables.name: platforms
variables.description: Where typography will be used — print, web, social, OOH, etc.

variables.name: personality
variables.description: Brand personality traits that should inform typeface selection

variables.name: readability
variables.description: Special readability requirements — accessibility standards, small sizes, etc.

inputs.name: brand
inputs.description: Brand or project requiring typography guidance

inputs.name: current_fonts
inputs.description: Typefaces currently in use or under consideration

inputs.name: platforms
inputs.description: Where typography will be used — print, web, social, OOH, etc.

inputs.description: Brand personality traits that should inform typeface selection

inputs.name: readability
inputs.description: Special readability requirements — accessibility standards, small sizes, etc.
